raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute the balances on two American Express business credit cards and request full removal of all amounts owed, based on repeated errors, rights violations, and deceptive practices. 
The accounts in question are : - Business Green Rewards Card ( XXXX ) Current Balance : {$3100.00} - Blue Business Plus Card ( XXXX ) Current Balance : {$1200.00} - Total Disputed Amount : {$4400.00} What Went Wrong : 1. I was charged for items and services that I never received, including an empty box, defective parts, and a hotel charge I did not authorize or complete. 2. I submitted multiple disputes with clear documentation, but American Express denied or closed these claims without fair investigation. 3. 
Instead of resolving the issues, Amex rebilled me and then pushed me into a financial relief program, forcing me to pay for transactions I rightfully contested. 4. That program continues to add interest and fees despite these being charges I never truly owed in the first place. 
Disputes that Were Ignored or Wrongfully Recharged : - {$370.00} Part never received from XXXX XXXX ( Ticket # XXXX ) - {$160.00} Unauthorized charge from XXXX - {$230.00} Empty package delivered ( Ref. XXXX ) - {$540.00} Item never received from XXXX XXXX XXXX ( Ref. D-72841365 ) Instead of resolving these valid disputes, American Express closed them and rebilled me, violating my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ).

Forced Into a Financial Relief Program : I was pressured into a financial relief plan that was never properly explained. This plan : - Includes interest and charges on disputed and invalid purchases- Makes me responsible for items and services I never received- Is a violation of my rights as a cardholder and small business owner My Request : I am demanding the complete removal of all balances on both cards : - {$3100.00} from the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - {$1200.00} from the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - Total : {$4400.00} I should owe nothing on these accounts due to Amex 's mishandling of disputes, failure to investigate, and coercion into an interest-bearing program that I should never have been in. 
Evidence Available : I can provide : - Screenshots of my current balances ( attached ) - Documentation from each dispute - Correspondence showing I never received the items - Evidence of being enrolled in the program against my wishes
